inventory.detail.empty: Open a product to inspect variant stock, low-stock signals and backorder policy from the inventory route.
inventory.detail.subtitle: Inspect stock health, backorder policy and per-variant visibility from the inventory-owned route.
inventory.detail.title: Inventory Detail
inventory.detail.transportGap: Dedicated inventory set/adjust/reserve quantity transport is available for targeted stock corrections and reservation flows; remaining inventory mutations are still being split from the umbrella ecommerce surface.
inventory.error.invalidQuantity: Quantity must be a whole number.
inventory.error.invalidReserveQuantity: Reserve quantity must be a non-negative whole number.
inventory.list.empty: No products match the current filters.
inventory.list.subtitle: Search the catalog and open a product to inspect variant-level stock data owned by the inventory boundary.
inventory.list.title: Inventory Feed
inventory.stat.backorderHint: Variants that continue selling below zero.
inventory.stat.healthyHint: Variants with sufficient stock and no backorder handling.
inventory.stat.lowStockHint: Variants at or below the low-stock threshold.
inventory.stat.outOfStockHint: Variants currently unavailable for immediate sale.
inventory.stat.totalQuantityHint: Summed quantity from the current product contract.
inventory.stat.variantsHint: Tracked SKUs in the selected product.
inventory.subtitle: Module-owned inventory surface for stock visibility, low-stock triage, variant health signals, targeted set-quantity corrections, +/-1 adjustments and reserve quantity flows while remaining inventory mutations are still being split from the umbrella transport.
inventory.title: Inventory Control
